# komodo_action (Resource)

Manages a Komodo action resource. Actions are TypeScript scripts that can be scheduled, triggered via webhook, or run manually.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "komodo_action" "example" {
  name          = "my-action"
  file_contents = <<-EOT
    import { KomodoClient } from "https://deno.land/x/komodo_client/mod.ts";

    const komodo = KomodoClient();
    console.log("Hello from action!");
  EOT

  schedule        = "0 * * * *"
  schedule_format = "Cron"
  schedule_enabled = true
  failure_alert   = true
  webhook_enabled = true
}
```

## Argument Reference

- `name` (Required) - The unique name of the action. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `run_at_startup` (Optional) - Whether to run the action at Komodo startup. Defaults to `false`.
- `schedule_format` (Optional) - The schedule format. One of `Cron` or `English`.
- `schedule` (Optional) - The schedule expression (cron string or English description).
- `schedule_enabled` (Optional) - Whether the schedule is enabled.
- `schedule_timezone` (Optional) - Timezone for the schedule (IANA TZ identifier, e.g. `America/New_York`).
- `schedule_alert` (Optional) - Whether to send an alert when the action runs on schedule.
- `failure_alert` (Optional) - Whether to send an alert when the action fails.
- `webhook_enabled` (Optional) - Whether to allow triggering the action via webhook.
- `webhook_secret` (Optional, Sensitive) - Override the default webhook secret for this action.
- `reload_deno_deps` (Optional) - Whether to reload Deno dependencies on each run.
- `file_contents` (Optional) - TypeScript file contents using the Komodo client.
- `arguments_format` (Optional) - The format for action arguments (e.g. `KeyValue` or `Toml`).
- `arguments` (Optional) - Default arguments passed to the action as the `ARGS` variable.

## Attribute Reference

In addition to the above arguments, the following computed attributes are exported:

- `id` - The action identifier (ObjectId).

## Import

Actions can be imported using the action ID:

```shell
terraform import komodo_action.example <action-id>
```
